checks.message: Talking-head type confirmed by single-speaker educational monologue. All enrichments use talking_head_section type. Consistent.

direct_opener attributed to section 4 (segs 81-121) but the content explicitly contrasts hit-and-runs with going direct (seg 70: 'It's not going in direct'). The compliments described are intentless, not direct openers.
subcommunication in section 4 has thin support — smiling and eye contact (seg 109) are behaviors mentioned in passing, not a taught subcommunication technique. Minor stretch.

Section sequence is coherent: intro → mindset reframe → checkpoint technique → hit-and-runs → warm-up after work. Logical pedagogical progression with no contradictions.
